text.title: star-interview-examples Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for star-interview-examples as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running live fully-automated candidate screening (accept/reject) without a human interviewer present.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: NYC AEDT law, Illinois AIVIA, and EU AI Act classify automated hiring decisions as high-risk and require bias audits, candidate disclosure, and consent. Fully automated screening without these controls is illegal in those jurisdictions.

failure-mode.description: Processing interview recordings without documented candidate consent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Recording without consent is illegal in California, EU member states, and Illinois. The consent flag must be verified before any audio processing begins.
